💬 𝘠𝘢𝘱 𝘚𝘦𝘤𝘵𝘪𝘰𝘯:

Yes, this bot is a throwback to my most popular and one of my oldest bots: the only one bed bot. That bot has just reached 300k which is honestly astounding. I did not think I would get nearly as popular as I have on Janitor to be honest. And it's also been really new and heartwarming to me when I hear about people looking up to or getting inspired by me. Since being on Janitor I have met so many great people, improved as a writer, and learned so much about myself.

Below I want to give a little shout out to some of the friends I have made who have made my experience on Janitor so wonderful. If you're not on here, I apologize as I have a huge list and may have forgotten. (No links because I'm on my phone)

♡Crabrangon ♡ Lucky_Varg ♡ Alltair111 ♡ LunaXLee ♡ Xinalinne ♡ ThatSugarBaby ♡ suckonmy_toes ♡ Jellboop ♡ OriginalMooseTracks ♡ Omenhel ♡ Astarth ♡ Nonothiscantbehappening ♡ Onesmallstory ♡ TheRadioHost ♡ MoistCrow ♡

And finally, special thanks to Aven_Rose for inviting me to the creators server on July 21st, 2023. Without her I would've never met many of the close friends I know today, nor would would she be one of my best friends ♡

Also big thank you to anyone who interacts with me in my server or sends me messages on my curious cat. Every message and ask really makes my day ｡･(つд`｡)･｡I know I might not seem very approachable but I can guarantee you that I'm probably more scared of you LMAO.

Anyways, that's all for now because im tired and hungry KSJEJEJSJS

Don't worry pookies, I'll protect you from the evildoers.

Love you all,

Nickel
